_comment: Relationship (edge) schema for Narrative Structures investigations. Each relationship connects two entities with a typed, sourced connection.

schema.from: string — entity id of the source node
schema.to: string — entity id of the target node
schema.type: enum — financial | employment | political | legal | personal | board | contractual | influence | adversarial
schema.label: string — short description shown on edge, e.g. 'appointed by' or 'received funds from'
schema.description: string — fuller explanation of the relationship
schema.date_end: YYYY-MM-DD or YYYY or null — use null if ongoing

example.label: voted to increase benefits
example.description: Cast deciding vote on Manager's Proposal 2 in 2002, increasing pension benefits without full actuarial funding.
